title: desmodium lempirae
intro: Desmodium lempirae, also known as Lempire's tick trefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Desmodium lempirae include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for treating various ailments. Desmodium lempirae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
